raw:
## Completed
Implemented the Foreman live status panel and dashboard ownership/session UX.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/reader.ts` - enriched live status model, added `formatStatusPanel`, picker sorting, elapsed/token formatting.
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/view.ts` - threaded `sessionId`, owner badges, mine-only filter, picker sort, live agent header enrichment.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - switched Foreman status from footer `setStatus` to `setWidget(..., { placement: "aboveEditor" })`; threaded sessionId into dashboard shortcuts.
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh` - extended headless tests for live transcript enrichment, panel formatting, session scoping, and picker sort.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh`

## Notes
Verified passing. Recon/code anchors: pure reader funcs at `reader.ts:289`, `318`, `511`, `596`, `686`, `749`, `781`, `800`; dashboard views at `view.ts:130`, `473`, `506`, `537`, `575`; shortcut/widget wiring at `index.ts:976`, `991`, `1084`.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
